prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约537名，2024年升至约415名（前移122名），2025年进一步前移至约404名（前移11名），近两年呈持续前移趋势，2025年基准位次约404名。；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年36人、2024年54人（大幅扩招50%）、2025年55人（微增1人），2026年计划55人，与2 025年持平。近年扩招后计划稳定，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第10名，属C9 联盟成员，综合实力稳居全国顶尖方阵；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（涉及师德师风舆情事件，校方已回应为谣言并报警处理）；抖音综合热度排名第24 位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，整体关注度较高但声誉信号偏谨慎；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达13个，其中动力工程及工程热物理、电气工程 、机械工程、控制科学与工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程、数学、工商管理、管理科学与工程获评A，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等西安交大王牌专业方向持续高热推荐，报考热度不减；新疆2026年高考总报名人数约23.8万人，较2025年（约7.65 万人）大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；西安交通大学位于陕西省西安市，与新疆同属西北地区，地理距离较近，交通便利，对 新疆考生具有天然的地域吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生计划占比较小（约55人），属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、新疆考生总 数大幅增长导致竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与王牌专业持续吸引高分考生等因素，在2025年基准404名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅前移难度增加；预测2026年最低位次约414 名，区间364-464名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间364-464名内，建议以二档为主力填报、一档王牌专业（钱学森班、电气类）冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（364名以内）可重点冲击一档A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（464名附近）应以三档专业为主确保录取。西安交大王牌工科专业实力极强，电气、能动、机械、控制均为A+，就业前景广阔。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 537, rising to about 415 in 2024 (moving forward by 122 places), and further advancing to about 404 in 2025 (moving forward by 11 places). The trend has been consistently moving forward over the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 404 in 2025. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 36 in 2023, 54 in 2024 (a significant expansion of 50%), 55 in 2025 (an increase of 1), and 55 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. After recent expansion, the plan has stabilized, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years and is a member of the C9 League, placing it firmly among the top tier of universities nationwide. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving an incident of teacher ethics and conduct, which the university has responded to as a rumor and reported to the police). Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating high overall attention but cautious reputation signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it achieved 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ ratings in Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering, and A ratings in Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering. Its disciplinary strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended, with no decrease in application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, which is relatively close to Xinjiang in the same northwest region, with convenient transportation, naturally attracting Xinjiang candidates. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang accounts for a small proportion (about 55 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of Xinjiang candidates leading to intensified competition, and the top-tier level and flagship majors of the university continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 404, making it more difficult to move forward in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 414, with a range of 364-464.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Qian Xuesen Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy Internet Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Material Innovation Design and Intelligent Manufacturing National Excellence Class) (Materials Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Yuejie Plan Machine Major Pre-selection)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer Science and Technology Category) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy Category) (Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Aviation Category) (Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing Category) (Mechanical Engineering, Smart Manufacturing Engineering, etc.)
- Information Engineering
- Accounting (ACCA).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 364-464, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Qian Xuesen Class, Electrical Category) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (within 364) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 A+ discipline majors; those with rankings near the upper limit (around 464) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship engineering majors are extremely strong, with Electrical, Energy and Power, Mechanical, and Control all rated A+, offering broad employment prospects.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Ranking and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 278, moving forward to about 202 in 2024 (a forward shift of 76), showing a clear forward trend; for 2025, using the 2024 ranking of 202 as the most recent baseline; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024 (unchanged), and 5 in 2026, an increase of 1 student compared to 2024 (a 25% increase), which helps reduce admission difficulty.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 10th in the Soft Science rankings for many consecutive years, a member of the C9 League, with top comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics and style public opinion); its Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with overall high attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration (A) and Marxist Theory (A), with strong liberal arts-related disciplines; although Law did not receive an A rating, it has a high reputation nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The liberal arts enrollment majors are Law Experimental Class and Liberal Arts Experimental Class; the social popularity of the Law major is recommended (relatively hot), and the Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended (relatively hot); the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000, a significant increase compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Xi'an is located in the northwest region, geographically close to Xinjiang, offering regional appeal to Xinjiang liberal arts candidates; the liberal arts enrollment plan is only 4-5 students, a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend in historical rankings, the 25% expansion in liberal arts enrollment in 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, the effect of expansion pushing back the ranking and the effect of increased competition from more candidates offset each other; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around the 2024 baseline of 202; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 242, with a range of 192-292.

The Law major has high social popularity and clear career paths (civil servant, lawyer, legal affairs, etc.), while the Liberal Arts Experimental Class covers Philosophy, Sociology, and Chinese Language and Literature, suitable for candidates with broad interests in humanities and social sciences.
